com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXApplicationContextListener


  • public interface IXApplicationContextListener
    Any plugin can implement this interface. If they do, they will be able to have access to the IXApplicationContext. To do this, they need to store the application context passed in as a parameter as an instance variable.

    WARNING: When the default constructor for any IXPlugin is called, the application context will not have been

    set yet.

    WARNING:You should also not expect the application context to be available in the getName(), getDescription(), getDescription() or getVersion() methods.

    See Also:
    IXApplicationContext

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setApplicationContext(IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
      This method should be implemented by the IXPlugin.

    • Method Detail

      • setApplicationContext

        void setApplicationContext(IXApplicationContext applicationContext)
        This method should be implemented by the IXPlugin. The IXPlugin should store the 'applicationContext' object passed in as a parameter for use later on.

        It is possible that the IXApplicationContext could change a few times during the life of the plugin. Therefore, if you decide to share this 'applicationContext' object with sereval other objects used by your IXPlugin, this method should update all those objects as well.

        Parameters:
        applicationContext - - the application context to be stored by the IXPlugin.
